title: Money!
description: A small Minecraft mod adding currency and trade-related things.
body: This mod adds a whole lot of stuff for trade in your Minecraft world. You can make one, Five, Ten, Fifty, and One-Hundred dollar bills! Also, for stores, you can make cash registers. And for everything, you can make a Mailbox. Don't like a house your friend made? Use the HOA Bill! Have a great time using Money! by Ojhamos Melons.
